problem.zh: agent 怎么记得自己三步之前读过哪个文件？它没有数据库——它的「记忆」就是那个不断增长的 messages 数组。
problem.en: How does the agent remember which file it read three steps ago? It has no database — its 'memory' is that growing messages array.

title.zh: Step 1 · 从用户的初始消息开始
title.en: Step 1 · Start from the initial user message

desc.zh: 入口构造第一条消息。这一条决定了整个任务。
desc.en: The entry point builds the first message. This single message defines the whole task.

code.snippet: const messages = [{ role: "user", content: process.argv[2] ?? "say hello" }];

title.zh: Step 2 · 每一轮都在追加，从不删除
title.en: Step 2 · Append every turn, never delete

desc.zh: assistant 的回复、tool 的结果，全部 push 进同一个数组。下一轮把整个数组发给模型——这就是「上下文」。
desc.en: Assistant replies and tool results all push into the same array. Next turn sends the whole array to the model — that IS the context.

deepDive.zh: 这种「无状态模型 + 有状态上下文」的设计非常强大，但有上限：上下文窗口。长对话必须压缩——滑动窗口、摘要、或把旧内容存到外部记忆（向量库/文件）。**真正的工程难点不在循环，而在管理上下文增长。**
deepDive.en: This 'stateless model + stateful context' design is powerful but bounded: the context window. Long conversations need compaction — sliding window, summarization, or offloading old content to external memory (vector store / files). **The hard engineering isn't the loop — it's managing context growth.**

references.title: Managing context for long agents (Anthropic cookbook)
